str.title: Strength (STR)
str.body: Increases melee damage and heavy-weapon effectiveness. Many weapons and skills require minimum STR to equip or rank up.

dex.title: Dexterity (DEX)
dex.body: Improves attack speed, evasion, and ranged accuracy. Rogues and Rangers lean on DEX for weapons and mobility skills.

vit.title: Vitality (VIT)
vit.body: Raises maximum health and survivability. Paladins start with higher VIT; all classes benefit from extra life.

magic.title: Magic
magic.body: Fuels spell power and mana-heavy skills. Sorcerers rely on Magic for projectile and utility spells.

rarity.title: Item Rarity
rarity.body: Common, Magic, Rare, and higher tiers unlock more affix rolls. Rarity color follows the inventory panel legend.

item_level.title: Item Level
item_level.body: Higher item levels scale base stats and requirements with dungeon depth tiers. Upgrades and drops respect your deepest cleared depth.

treasure_classes.title: Treasure Classes
treasure_classes.intro: Loot profiles point monsters, chests, and bosses at a treasure class (TC). Each attempt rolls success vs no-drop, then picks a weighted entry from the table.

resource_drops.title: Resource Drops
resource_drops.intro: Upgrade Shards and Renew Stones drop from a separate resource pool on kills and chest opens. Tier chances depend on monster or chest type.

blacksmith_upgrade.title: Upgrade Item
blacksmith_upgrade.intro: Spend gold (equal to the item sell price) plus an Upgrade Shard whose level is at least the target item level. Success raises item level and rescales stats.

blacksmith_renew.title: Renew Item
blacksmith_renew.intro: Spend gold (sell price) plus a Renew Stone whose level is at least the item level. Random affixes reroll; unique fixed effects stay intact.

shard_merge.title: Merge Resources
shard_merge.intro: At the blacksmith merge tab, combine three leveled Upgrade Shards or Renew Stones of the same level into one stone of level +1.
